banner.title: Save your Security Key
banner.description: Your security key was just generated. It's the only way to reset your password — store it somewhere safe before leaving this page.

page.noMatchesSubtext: Match history will appear here once available

sheet.title: Edit profile
sheet.description: Changes are saved immediately. Email changes affect your login.
sheet.displayNameHint: Max 20 characters. Shown on your profile and in-game.
sheet.emailHint: Max 30 characters. Used to log in.
sheet.passwordSuccess: Password changed. Your new security key is shown below.
sheet.passwordNewPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
sheet.passwordHint: Use your security key to reset your password.
sheet.passwordReset: Forgot your key? Go to the password reset page.
sheet.securityKeyDescription: Your security key is required to change your password. Keep it safe.
sheet.securityKeyMissing: Security key not available in this session. Log out and back in, or use the password reset page to get a new one.
sheet.securityKeyWarning: This key will not be shown again. Store it somewhere safe.
sheet.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

addProfile.title: Create New Profile
addProfile.description: Add a new profile to your account. Click save when you're done.
addProfile.errorUsernameTooLong: Username must be 20 characters or less.
addProfile.errorUsernameTaken: That username is already taken. Please choose a different one.
addProfile.errorMaxProfiles: You already have the maximum number of profiles.
addProfile.errorSaveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.
